murilloskills.skill.desc.miner: Master of the depths. Increases mining speed and ore fortune.
murilloskills.skill.desc.warrior: Valorous combatant. Increases melee damage and max health.
murilloskills.skill.desc.farmer: Harvest master. Increases crop production and double harvest.
murilloskills.skill.desc.archer: Silent death. Improves arrow speed, damage and precision.
murilloskills.skill.desc.fisher: Master fisherman. Reduces wait time and increases treasure chance.
murilloskills.skill.desc.blacksmith: Master forger. Improves equipment and increases resistance.
murilloskills.skill.desc.builder: Creative architect. Increases building reach and speed.
murilloskills.skill.desc.explorer: Free spirit. Increases mobility and detects hidden treasures.
murilloskills.ability.desc.miner: X-Ray: Reveals valuable ores in a large area.
murilloskills.ability.desc.warrior: Berserk: Gains Strength II, Speed II and Resistance.
murilloskills.ability.desc.farmer: Harvest Moon: Automatically harvests crops around you with triple drops.
murilloskills.ability.desc.archer: Master Ranger: Arrows track enemies for 30 seconds.
murilloskills.ability.desc.fisher: Rain Dance: Summons rain with massive fishing bonuses for 60s.
murilloskills.ability.desc.blacksmith: Titanium Aura: Knockback immunity, maximum resistance, regeneration.
murilloskills.ability.desc.builder: Creative Brush: Fill areas between two points automatically.
murilloskills.ability.desc.explorer: Sixth Sense: Reveals chests and spawners in a 32 block radius.
murilloskills.tooltip.fisher_total_luck: Total Luck of the Sea: %s (enchant %s + skill %s)

murilloskills.info.title: Mod Information
murilloskills.info.status.title: Your Current Status
murilloskills.info.synergies.title: All Skill Synergies
murilloskills.info.synergies.desc: Select complementary skills to unlock bonus effects!
murilloskills.info.prestige.title: Prestige System
murilloskills.info.prestige.desc1: Prestige allows you to reset a skill for permanent bonuses.
murilloskills.info.prestige.desc2: Each prestige level grants +5% XP gain and +2% passive effectiveness.
murilloskills.info.prestige.desc3: Maximum prestige level: 100 (for +500% XP and +200% passives!)
murilloskills.info.prestige.req2: Skill must be your Paragon skill
murilloskills.info.perks.title: Complete Skill Guide
murilloskills.info.guide.level100: What you will have at level 100
murilloskills.info.guide.choose.miner: Pick Miner for faster resource progression, cave runs and heavy mining.
murilloskills.info.guide.choose.warrior: Pick Warrior for melee damage, tankiness, sustain and combat survival.
murilloskills.info.guide.choose.farmer: Pick Farmer for mass production, reliable harvests and farm automation.
murilloskills.info.guide.choose.archer: Pick Archer for ranged damage, safer fights, headshots and target control.
murilloskills.info.guide.choose.fisher: Pick Fisher for passive profit, treasure drops, faster fishing and water utility.
murilloskills.info.guide.choose.blacksmi: Pick Blacksmith for resistance, anvil efficiency and gear-focused progression.
murilloskills.info.guide.choose.builder: Pick Builder for reach, block economy and faster building workflows.
murilloskills.info.guide.choose.explorer: Pick Explorer for mobility, utility and treasure hunting.

murilloskills.ore_filter.subtitle: Configure which ores appear in the radar
murilloskills.ore_filter.mode.nearest_on: Shows only the nearest of each type
